---
description: WF-193FE — changelog reports must be written to docs/, not pasted in chat
applyTo: "docs/changelogs/**"
---

# Output to Docs (WF-193FE)

When generating repo changelog reports:

1. Write the full report to `docs/changelogs/<repo-slug>-<branch>-<from>-<to>.md`.
2. Chat reply = file path + 1–2 sentences only.
3. Never paste the full report, module sections, or tables into chat.
